metadata.description: x-mesh toolkit — structured problem solving, strategy orchestration, and multi-agent primitives for Claude Code

plugins.name: build
plugins.description: Phase-based project harness with PRD generation, consensus review, plan validation, multi-mode deliberation, DAG execution, cost forecasting, and decision memory

plugins.name: agent
plugins.description: Agent primitives and autonomous behaviors — fan-out, delegate, broadcast, research, solve, consensus, swarm for native multi-agent orchestration

plugins.name: op
plugins.description: Strategy orchestration — 17 strategies with self-scoring, x-eval verification, and compose presets

plugins.name: solver
plugins.description: Structured problem solving — decompose, iterate, constrain, or auto-pipeline with strategy recommendation

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Multi-perspective code review orchestrator — PR diff analysis with severity-rated findings and LGTM verdict

plugins.name: trace
plugins.description: Agent execution tracing — timeline, token/cost tracking, replay, and diff for multi-agent observability

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Cross-session decision and pattern memory — persist learnings, auto-inject relevant context on session start

plugins.name: eval
plugins.description: Agent output quality evaluation — multi-rubric scoring, diff analysis, reusable judge prompt, strategy benchmarking, and A/B prompt experiments

plugins.name: probe
plugins.description: Premise validation — evidence-grade questioning, domain-aware probing, kill bad ideas early, earn the right to build

plugins.name: humble
plugins.description: Structured retrospective — reflect on failures together, find root causes, explore alternatives, and grow

plugins.name: humanize
plugins.description: Remove AI writing patterns — detect and rewrite AI-generated text into natural human prose (English + Korean)

plugins.name: dashboard
plugins.description: Web dashboard for .xm project state — visualize builds, probes, solvers, reviews, evals, humble lessons, traces, memory

plugins.name: recall
plugins.description: Cross-session artifact index — find and read review/op/plan/eval/probe outputs across Claude, Codex, and Cursor sessions in the same repo

plugins.name: panel
plugins.description: Cross-model adversarial review panel — run claude/codex/agy/cursor on the same target, refute, and synthesize a consensus verdict

plugins.name: remote
plugins.description: Linux-first Discord control plane for x-kit-managed Claude and Codex sessions

plugins.name: xm
plugins.description: All-in-one bundle: build + op + agent + solver + eval + humble + cross-plugin quality pipeline

plugins.name: wt
plugins.description: Session worktree — isolate the whole session in a git worktree, then land it back to the parent branch (no gate, no task DAG)
